_description: Civilian overextension case — Marcus Webb, single loan, stable employment, spending overextension. Contrast case: orchestrator should choose financial investigation path, skip synthesize_approach, and proceed directly to guidance generation.
member_statement: I took on too much debt over the past year — new car, some credit cards — and my monthly payments have gotten to a point where I'm struggling to keep up. I'm still employed full-time but I'm stretched thin. I have a personal loan with you and I'm looking to see if there's any way to reduce my monthly payment for a while until I can get things under control.

member_profile.payment_history: two 30-day lates in the past 18 months
